ideation: This sequence aims to capture the whimsical and delicate nature of a fairy, using fluid arm movements that suggest both magical power and ethereal grace. The arms will move in a way that evokes a sense of wonder and enchantment, drawing inspiration from the imagery typically associated with fairies. The animation will focus on the arms, using slight variations in joint angles and wrist positions to create a sense of delicate movement and enchanting gestures.  The sequence will start with arms slightly raised and angled outwards, palms facing upward, as if summoning magical energy. Then, the arms will gracefully move upward and outward, palms now facing forward, to convey a feeling of spreading magic. Next, the arms will move downward and slightly inward, palms facing each other, creating a sense of gathering magical energy. Finally, the arms will return to their initial position, completing the cycle and suggesting a continuation of the fairy's magical actions.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, creating a sense of enchantment and dreaminess.

frames.beat: arms lift and open, palms up, summoning magic
arms sweep upward and outward, spreading enchantment
arms gather inward and down, magic coalescing
arms return to rest, a gentle fairy's poise
